comment.body:
my advice is to take a brake,
take my weekly and daily posts for this week,
plot the levels on the chart with notes,
print it via a printer, close the PC, take a paper and start to analyse the structure that you see
which zone means what..

then looking at the plotted chart, seeing what meaning the market assigned to those certain areas
